---
name: Runtime / library support request
about: Suggest a runtime or library you'd like ember Pro to recognize
title: '[runtime] '
labels: corpus-request
---

**Runtime / library name**

(e.g. Unity IL2CPP, Unreal UObject, V8 builtins, Luau VM, OpenSSL, glibc.)

**Source**

Where the binaries come from, including license terms if known.
(e.g. "shipped with Unity Editor 2022.3, EULA prohibits redistribution"
vs "Apache-2.0 source on GitHub, you can build it yourself".)

**Why it's interesting**

What use case does recognizing this runtime unlock?

**Anything you can share**

Public references, blog posts, prior RE work, version-drift notes —
**not** binary samples or annotations from RE'd builds. See
`CONTRIBUTING.md` for what we can and can't accept.
